description: Medium deck walk: contact w/ role, safety, decision, part, price, plus weather/lunch chatter that R6 must NOT extract.

items.text: top railing loose, do not lean until re-anchored
pull the two soft north-side joists and swap them out
about ninety dollars for the lumber at the yard
call Dev Thursday to schedule the joist swap
use hidden fasteners on the decking instead of face screws
